title: Separate harness config root and profile in role config and RuntimeConfig
description: Remove claude_code_config_path and codex_config_path direct overrides from role config. Rename claude_code_config_path_prefix to claude_code_config_root (and same for codex). Store harness_config_root + profile separately in RuntimeConfig instead of pre-joined harness_config_dir. Add helper to resolve Claude Code session log path: <config_root>/<profile>/projects/<sanitize(cwd)>/<harness_session_id>.jsonl. Fix resolveSessionLogPath in Claude harness to use this.

comments.author: misc-fog
comments.text: SCOPING (misc-fog, no code changes) — see docs/h2-u9w.6-scoping.md. Summary: bead is ~80% already satisfied by intervening work (4mo stale). No mild-cloud branch exists (nothing pushed). Task-by-task: (1) direct-override removal = already done (fields don't exist); (2) *_config_path_prefix→*_config_root rename = the ONLY residual (cosmetic, 72 refs/15 files); (3) separate root+profile in RuntimeConfig = already done (HarnessConfigPathPrefix+Profile stored separately, HarnessConfigDir() is computed); (4) Claude session-log-path helper = already done (NativeLogPathSuffix + NativeSessionLogPath); (5) fix resolveSessionLogPath = obsolete (no such function). h2-u9w.7 is NOT hard-blocked (it needs the structural separation, which exists, not the field name). REC: NO-GO on reviving as-written; close tasks 1/3/4/5, fold the rename into h2-u9w.7 (or tiny standalone PR after h2-mzc lands to avoid a role_warnings.go conflict). Backwards-compat of the yaml/json key rename is the one Danny decision.
